item.title: The 'Buffett Indicator' shows the market is way overvalued. How to hedge risk with this options strategy
item.description: Michael Khouw breaks down how to hedge risk as the "Buffett Indicator" flags a warnings signal.

item.title: Josh Brown likes this trash and recycling management giant that's within striking distance of a record
item.description: Josh Brown and Sean Russo break down this trash and recycling management giant.

item.title: Michael Burry sees Nvidia 'purchase commitment' parallel to Cisco at dot-com bubble top
item.description: "This is not business as usual. This is risk," Burry said of Nvidia's surge in purchase obligations.

item.title: Citi says this stablecoin issuer is its top pick, expects stock to nearly triple
item.description: Citi sees shares of Circle Internet Group rallying 192% from here.

item.title: Nvidia posted another blockbuster quarter. One analyst says the stock is a ‘coiled spring’ waiting to snap higher
item.description: For the most part, analysts maintained their long-term bullish stance on Nvidia.
